comment.body:
I'm no Greek wizherd but here's what it say... Combining the approximations for a single-day 5% drop and 15-point IV spike:
​Delta Loss: -$72.5M
​Gamma Loss: -$16.3M
​Vega Loss: -$0.89M
​Theta Gain: +$1.88M
​Net Daily PnL: -$87.81 million
​This $-87.81 million loss actually exceeds the portfolio's stated 99% VAR of $80.18 million, proving that a 5% sudden drop is a true tail-risk event for this structure. The $9 million in Net Liquidity is instantly wiped out ten times over, triggering a catastrophic margin call from the broker.
